title: Constant expression in partial index results in row not being fetched
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 Int32, c2 String, c3 Float64);
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (1, 'test', 3.14);
CREATE TABLE t2(c4 Int32, c5 UInt8) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY c4;
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE (c1 IS NOT NULL) AND (c3 < 5.0);
SELECT count() FROM t1 WHERE (c1 > 0) AND (c2 IS NOT NULL);
key_bug_features: Partial index with constant expression prevents row fetching
